entry.name: GIMBAL_DEVICE_CAP_FLAGS_HAS_RETRACT
entry.description: Gimbal device supports a retracted position.

entry.name: GIMBAL_DEVICE_CAP_FLAGS_CAN_POINT_LOCATION_GLOBAL
entry.description: Gimbal device supports to point to a global latitude, longitude, altitude position.

message.name: GIMBAL_DEVICE_INFORMATION
message.description: Information about a low level gimbal. This message should be requested by the gimbal manager or a ground station using MAV_CMD_REQUEST_MESSAGE. The maximum angles and rates are the limits by hardware. However, the limits by software used are likely different/smaller and dependent on mode/settings/etc..
message.field: Extended bitmap of gimbal capability flags (32 bit). For backwards compatibility, the lower 16 bits should also be set in cap_flags. Ground stations should prefer this field if non-zero.
